case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA,INC.,ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SU vs. RIVERA, BLANCA et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE RIVERA, CECILIA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA,INC.,ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SU AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, BLANCA RIVERA, CECILIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA,INC.,ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, BLANCA RIVERA, CECILIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 637 GOETTINGEN ST, DOWNSTAIRS UNIT, AND TENANTS SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
